summary: Entry and exit seams are clean. Ch16 ends in a tentatively hopeful afternoon; Ch17 opens eight days later at 9:15 PM with Dan paralyzed at the empty table — temporal gap clearly established, emotional shift natural. Ch17 exits with both characters lying awake, the unresolved question 'do you want this' hanging; Ch18 opens with Dan unconsciously making two cups of coffee, the answer forming in domestic gesture. Opening constructions are structurally distinct (Ch17: retrospective temporal measurement on a kitchen table; Ch18: immediate habitual action with a coffee maker). Environmental continuity threads (stoop music, refrigerator clicks, F train, Theo's drawings) are consistent across boundaries. Dialogue register on-model per style bible: Dan at high contraction with hedging and false starts, Mira at moderate contraction with strategic precision and clipping under pressure. No style bible example lines appear verbatim. No edits required.
